ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Milcery via PokemonTCG.io API card swsh2-86; National Pokedex no. 868, Fairy-type whipped-cream Pokemon introduced in Generation VIII (Pokemon Sword & Shield).

trivia_bullets.text: Milcery (National Pokedex no. 868) is a pure Fairy-type introduced in Generation VIII. Its body is made of cream; it evolves into Alcremie (no. 869), whose design is based on whipped-cream desserts decorated with sweet toppings.
sources: WebSearch: NintendoWire 'How to Evolve Milcery into All 63 Alcremie Forms'

trivia_bullets.text: "This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream."

Milcery has the most variation-rich evolution mechanic in the franchise. Alcremie has 63 distinct forms determined by: (1) spin direction (clockwise or counterclockwise), (2) spin duration (short, medium, long, or ultra-long), and (3) type of Sweet held (7 options: Berry, Clover, Flower, Love, Ribbon, Star, or Strawberry). This produces 9 cream colors × 7 sweet toppings = 63 forms.
sources: WebSearch: NintendoWire 'Pokémon Sword and Shield: How to Evolve Milcery into All 63 Alcremie Forms'
WebSearch: GameWith 'Alcremie — How To Evolve From Milcery'

trivia_bullets.text: This print is illustrated by Mina Nakai, who also illustrated the Hatenna print in the same set (RBC-083) — both are Sword & Shield-introduced Fairy-line basics placed in warm pastel settings.

related_cards.name: Hatenna
related_cards.note: Same artist (Mina Nakai), same set, co-introduced SwSh Fairy-side species
